decks.notes: The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to utilize low-cost aggressive creatures like Soul-Scar Mage, Monastery Swiftspear, and Cori-Steel Cutter, along with cheap burn spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Academic Dispute and Stock Up to draw into more threats and keep up pressure. The mana base includes cards like Spirebluff Canal and Shivan Reef for consistent early game aggression. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent quickly and win through aggressive creature combat and burn damage.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures and burning spells to deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. By using cheap creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage alongside burn spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage, the deck aims to apply pressure early and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize. The mana base is streamlined to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors for spells, enabling a fast and efficient offensive strategy.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly playing low-cost creatures and spells to deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. It utilizes cards like Soul-Scar Mage, Monastery Swiftspear, and Cori-Steel Cutter to pressure the opponent early on, while also using spells like Reckless Rage and Burst Lightning to remove blockers and deal direct damage. The deck aims to maintain a fast pace and overwhelm the opponent before they can set up their own game plan, ultimately securing a quick victory through aggressive plays and efficient card usage.

The deck is focused on controlling the opponent's actions and resources through counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. The key concept revolves around maintaining board control, disrupting the opponent's strategy, and outvaluing them by generating card advantage. This is achieved by using cards like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria, Supreme Verdict, and Dovin's Veto to control the board, while cards like Consult the Star Charts and Meticulous Archive provide card advantage to stay ahead. The deck aims to grind out the opponent by playing the long game and ultimately overwhelming them with powerful late-game threats.

This deck focuses on combining the abilities of Greasefang and Parhelion II to create a powerful and resilient board presence. Utilizing cards like Bitter Triumph, Monument to Endurance, and Thoughtseize, the deck aims to control the game while setting up its combo pieces. Support is provided by cards like Fatal Push and Guardian of New Benalia to maintain board presence and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes various dual lands to ensure consistent mana production for its high-costed spells.

This deck focuses on using a combination of removal spells, hand disruption, and resilient threats to control the game until it can overwhelm the opponent. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Duress, while using removal spells like Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay to deal with threats. The deck also includes powerful creatures like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse and Sentinel of the Nameless City to apply pressure and close out the game. Overall, the deck seeks to outvalue and outlast the opponent in a grindy, attrition-based matchup.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly establish a board presence with efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, while using burn spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage to control the opponent's board. The deck also includes card draw and spell recursion through cards like Stock Up and Academic Dispute to maintain momentum. By utilizing low-cost spells and creatures, the deck aims to apply pressure early in the game and overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on utilizing Niv-Mizzet Reborn as a control element, with a mix of removal, mana fixing, and value-generating cards to control the game and out-value the opponent. The deck also incorporates a companion in the form of Yorion, Sky Nomad to provide additional flexibility and card advantage. By combining a variety of powerful cards in multiple colors, this deck aims to establish board control, disrupt the opponent's strategy, and ultimately win through card advantage and powerful threats like Niv-Mizzet, Supreme and Omnath, Locus of Creation.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and efficient creatures, burn spells, and pump spells to deal damage quickly and efficiently. By utilizing powerful aggro cards like Questing Druid, Emberheart Challenger, and Monastery Swiftspear, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. With a mix of burn spells, pump spells, and removal like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage, the deck is designed to maintain board presence and deal damage consistently until the opponent is defeated.

The deck focuses on aggressive creatures with flying abilities to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It also includes spells to counter and disrupt the opponent's strategies, allowing for more efficient attacks. The deck aims to maintain control of the board while consistently putting pressure on the opponent to finish the game quickly. It utilizes a mix of creatures, spells, and lands to create a versatile and threatening gameplay style.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the Greasefang Parhelion combo, using cards like Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II to create a powerful board presence. The deck also includes a mix of removal spells and disruption cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the game and protect the combo. The mana base is carefully crafted to support the deck's strategy and ensure consistency in casting its key spells. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its combo while maintaining control of the game.

The deck focuses on control through disruption and removal, while also utilizing powerful creatures like Sentinel of the Nameless City and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse to apply pressure. The mana base is designed to support both early game acceleration and late game resilience. The inclusion of cards like Duress and Thoughtseize helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while Fatal Push, Abrupt Decay, and Go for the Throat deal with threats efficiently. Overall, the deck aims to control the game and outvalue the opponent through versatile and impactful card choices.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. It utilizes cards like Soul-Scar Mage, Monastery Swiftspear, and Emberheart Challenger to deal damage efficiently. The deck also includes removal spells like Reckless Rage and Fiery Impulse to clear the way for its creatures. The key strategy is to maintain pressure on the opponent and finish them off before they can stabilize. The mana base is constructed to support the deck's low curve and ensure the consistent casting of spells.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on controlling the opponent's board with a variety of removal spells and disruption like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize. The deck also utilizes cards like Narset, Parter of Veils and Cryogen Relic to generate card advantage and slow down the opponent's game plan. Yorion, Sky Nomad serves as a versatile companion to provide additional value by flickering permanents. The mana base includes utility lands like Field of Ruin and Geier Reach Sanitarium to further disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck aims to control the game until it can secure a win condition through attrition.

This deck focuses on using Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II to create a powerful combo that overwhelms the opponent. The deck includes support cards like Monument to Endurance and Iron-Shield Elf to protect and enhance the combo pieces. Thoughtseize and Fatal Push are included for disruption and removal, while cards like Vanishing Verse and Lively Dirge help control the board. The deck also includes various lands to support its mana base and ensure optimal card draw. Overall, the strategy is to assemble the combo pieces quickly and efficiently to outpace the opponent.

The deck focuses on assembling the Greasefang, Parhelion combo to create a powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent. It includes various support cards to protect and enable the combo, such as Fatal Push for removal, Thoughtseize for disruption, and Monument to Endurance for extra value. The deck aims to create a strong synergy between its cards and quickly set up the combo to win the game.
